medications.indication_rationale: Empirical acid suppression for dyspepsia; source used pantoprazole 40mg daily 30 min before breakfast for 4 weeks.
medications.dose_route_frequency: 40mg orally once daily, 30–60 min before breakfast, for 4 weeks (as per source note)

medications.indication_rationale: NSAIDs erode gastric mucosa and worsen dyspepsia/ulcer risk — avoid.

behavioural_change_actions.specific_action: Eat smaller, more frequent meals; reduce caffeine, alcohol, fatty/spicy foods and late large meals.
behavioural_change_actions.rationale: Reduces gastric distension and acid-triggered symptoms.
Smoking increases acid and relaxes the lower oesophageal sphincter.

patient_education_points.point: This is indigestion (dyspepsia) — an irritated, acid-sensitive stomach. A PPI plus smaller meals and avoiding triggers should ease the burning within a few days. We should also test for the Helicobacter bug, a common cause.
Avoid anti-inflammatory painkillers (ibuprofen/naproxen) as they irritate the stomach; cut down caffeine and smoking.

Go to ED if you vomit blood or coffee-ground material, pass black tarry stools, or get sudden severe rigid tummy pain. And because tummy pain can occasionally be the heart, call 000 for chest tightness, arm/jaw pain, sweating or breathlessness. See a doctor for any trouble swallowing or unintentional weight loss.

follow_up_plan.what_to_reassess: Response to PPI; arrange H. pylori testing; endoscopy if alarm features/refractory.
follow_up_plan.trigger_for_earlier_review: GI bleeding/dysphagia/weight loss — GP/ED; cardiac features — 000.

must_include_items: Screen GI alarm features (bleeding, dysphagia, weight loss, age>60) before empirical treatment
PPI + lifestyle + arrange H. pylori testing
Cardiac safety-net (epigastric pain not fully excludable as ACS remotely)
acceptable_alternatives: H. pylori test-and-treat before or alongside PPI; any PPI
errors_of_commission: Immediate endoscopy referral without alarm features (over-investigation)
Confidently excluding cardiac cause without acknowledging remote limits
scoring_rubric.passing_threshold_notes: Pass requires an alarm-feature screen, PPI + H. pylori pathway, and GI-bleed + cardiac safety-nets.
